- Node 7: purple, 9 pixels, boundary=[[3, 42], [3, 44], [5, 44], [5, 42]] - this is the purple icon content

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try arrow keys to see what they do
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print(f"RIGHT: board_changed={result.get('board_changed')}, gameplay_changed={result.get('gameplay_changed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Check if indicator moved
for n in nodes:
    if n['id'] == 8:
        print(f"  Indicator: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check main area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRow 7 (indicator area):")
print(f"Row 7: {ascii_lines[7][30:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
